name: Chocolate Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Unsweetened chocolate (cut into small pieces)
2 cups Soft white bread crumbs (loosely packed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chocolate and Half and half in a large saucepan over low heat for 12-15 minutes, stirring frequently until the chocolate is completely melted.
2. Remove the pan from the heat, stir in the bread crumbs, and let stand for one hour.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Beat the eggs until frothy, then blend in the sugar, vanilla, and salt. Mix into the chocolate mixture.
5. Pour the pudding into a buttered 1 1/2-quart casserole dish. Set it in a shallow baking pan and pour enough hot water into the pan to come halfway up the sides of the casserole.
6. Bake the pudding uncovered for 50 to 60 minutes, or until the pudding is set like custard. Test by inserting a toothpick in the center; if it comes out clean, the pudding is done.
7. Serve the pudding warm, topped with dollops of whipped cream.
